findings.name: Emergency: remote desktop service newly exposed
findings.evidence: RDP appeared on a previously SSH/HTTPS-only administrative appliance.

findings.name: Emergency: SMB service newly exposed on administrative appliance
findings.evidence: SMB appeared on an appliance baseline that did not previously expose file sharing.

findings.name: Emergency: administrative panel exposed on alternate web port
findings.evidence: An administrative console appeared on tcp/9000.

findings.name: Emergency: alternate TLS administrative port exposed
findings.evidence: A secondary administrative TLS listener appeared on tcp/9443.

findings.name: Emergency: unexpected HTTP alternate service
findings.evidence: A new HTTP alternate service appeared on tcp/8080.
